name: LexisNexis ThreatMetrix
description: ThreatMetrix (LexisNexis Risk Solutions) offers a global Digital Identity Network with device fingerprinting, behavior analytics and threat intelligence. Its API delivers real-time risk decisions for login, payments and new account opening

seo.title: LexisNexis ThreatMetrix — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: LexisNexis ThreatMetrix: ThreatMetrix (LexisNexis Risk Solutions) offers a global Digital Identity Network with device fingerprinting, behavior analytics and th

when_to_use: Digital Identity Network device reputation scoring at login
Behavioral analytics for new account opening fraud detection
Real-time risk decision API for payment authorization flows
Account takeover prevention via device and behavior fusion
Fraud consortium intelligence for cross-merchant signal sharing

pros: Strong signals across login, payment, onboarding
cons: Integration heavier than modern API-first rivals
Value depends on staying on the network
review.verdict: Still one of the deepest fraud signal networks on the planet, but newer tools are more pleasant to integrate.
review.best_for: Global banks and large merchants needing deep cross-industry fraud signals and maturity.
review.not_for: Startups and indie SaaS that want a modern API with self-serve pricing.

lock_in.reason: Digital identity data network deeply tied
